title: Boss Mobile / Papa Life — Legacy Lead-Intake Cloud ↔ Server Contract
description: This legacy contract documents optional lead-intake synchronization between bossmobilelifecoach.com and a cloud automation service. It is not part of the Papa Life Commercial System launch path, payment-to-access flow, production verification, or launch-readiness workflow.

outbound.description: Server → cloud when a new contact is saved through GHL or site intake. This contact workflow must not grant membership, create Course 11 access, or determine payment success.

body.prompt: Optional natural-language task for the cloud, including a contact summary.
body.outreach_note: string — optional Papa Life note for GHL

example.prompt: New Papa Life lead: Marcus Reed, marcus@example.com, 410-555-0199, source Facebook. Draft a warm follow-up text in Brian's voice and suggest one next step.

inbound.description: Cloud → server legacy contact notification. It is not a commercial payment or entitlement endpoint.

endpoints.body: GHL contact fields or { contact: { ... } }; optional outreach_note

commercial_flow_rule: The $4.99 membership checkout-to-Course-11 journey must be traced through its authenticated billing event and entitlement path. Do not infer commercial completion from this legacy cloud contract or AUTOMATION_CLOUD_WEBHOOK_URL.
